input.command:
python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json
# Search Mar 20 articles for key topics
keywords = {
    'lukashenko': 'Lukashenko', 'iqair': 'IQAir', 'most polluted': 'IQAir',
    'ipl': 'IPL', 'blitzer': 'IPL',
    'trump plan iran': 'Trump plan', '15-point': 'Trump plan', 'trump peace': 'Trump plan',
    'oman iran': 'Oman', 'swiss iran': 'Swiss',
    'hezbollah rocket': 'Hezbollah', 'hezbollah target': 'Hezbollah', 'hezbollah strike': 'Hezbollah',
    'northern israel': 'northern Israel',
    'drone latvia': 'Latvia', 'drone crash': 'Latvia drone',
    'australia visa': 'Australia visa', 'temporary visa': 'Australia visa',
    'world cup playoff semifinal': 'WC playoff',
    'afghanistan dennis': 'Afghanistan',
    'mosque minaret': 'Lebanon mosque',
    'ground vehicle collision': 'flight collision', 'plane collision landing': 'flight collision',
    'air force crash': 'air force crash',
    'news organization journalist surrounded': 'news org',
    'navy search aid boats': 'navy search',
}
found = 0
with open('articles/2026/03/20/articles.jsonl','r') as f:
    for line in f:
        a = json.loads(line)
        title = (a.get('title') or '').lower()
        content = (a.get('content') or '')[:1500].lower()
        for kw, label in keywords.items():
            if kw in title:
                print(f'[{label}] {a["title"][:120]}')
                found += 1
                break
print(f'\nTotal: {found}')
PYEOF
